alternative_parents.description: Aliphatic Hydrocarbons that contains one or more unsaturated carbon atoms. These compounds contain one or more double or triple bonds.
alternative_parents.name: Unsaturated aliphatic hydrocarbons

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a bond between carbon a pnictogen atom. Pnictogens are p-block element atoms that are in the group 15 of the periodic table.
alternative_parents.name: Organopnictogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a bond between a carbon atom and an oxygen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organooxygen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a nitrogen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organonitrogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Acyclic and cyclic hydrocarbons having one or more carbon-carbon double bonds, apart from the formal ones in aromatic compounds. The class of olefins subsumes alkenes and cycloalkenes and the corresponding polyenes.
alternative_parents.name: Olefins

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds that have a negative electric charge.
alternative_parents.name: Organic anions

class.description: Polycyclic organic compounds made up only of carbon and hydrogen atoms.
class.name: Polycyclic hydrocarbons

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as polycyclic hydrocarbons. These are polycyclic organic compounds made up only of carbon and hydrogen atoms.

direct_parent.description: Polycyclic organic compounds made up only of carbon and hydrogen atoms.
direct_parent.name: Polycyclic hydrocarbons

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

superclass.description: Organic compounds made up only of carbon and hydrogen atoms.
superclass.name: Hydrocarbons
